questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'getRequest()' method in a servlet to access HTTP request parameters?
questions.hint: It retrieves the HTTP request parameters

questions.question: How do you access the value of a specific servlet parameter using Java code in a servlet?
questions.hint: You can use the 'getParameter()' method of the 'HttpServletRequest' object

questions.question: If a servlet parameter is not present in the HTTP request, what happens when you try to access it using 'getRequest().getParameter()'?
